name: Scripted Structured Collapsible Hamper - Black - Brightroom™
description:
Bring style and function to your laundry room with this Scripted Structured Collapsible Hamper from Brightroom™. Made of lightweight polyester in black with the word "Laundry" in white, this 3900-cubic-inch capacity hamper features an open top and handles for convenient carrying, and the collapsible design allows for easy storage when not in use.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
